now: Phase 1 de-risk spike COMPLETE — all 7 verdicts GO. Real capture→encode→decode→input pipeline proven (Godot 45fps occluded, real fixture 254 frames decode 254/254 Chromium, mouse+keyboard inject, stable-cert TCC persistence, CGWindowID stable). Committed 7dbd35cf
next: Phase 2: Domain, Protocol & Session Core (TDD) — expand tasks (folds Phase 1 fixtures in)

agents.note: Booted + briefed at phase start, but idle-timed-out during the multi-day human-blocked TCC-grant wait BEFORE review pings arrived (0 findings = did not review, not a clean pass). Spike code is throwaway evidence; post-hoc review optional. magicWand was minih-infra, surfaced not actioned.

nodes.label: Research
nodes.command: /the-flow 1a explore "Remote view mode for chainglass: stream a single desktop app window (Godot game, iOS Simulator) from the host Mac into the content area with mouse/keyboard input; terminal over/beside it; agent-controllable via CLI/URL endpoints"
nodes.user_input: lets get a plan started for it please. set up flow and straight in to explore
nodes.note: 8-subagent dossier: all web-side surfaces precedented (sidecar lifecycle, auth, view modes, SDK); the Swift capture daemon is the only novel artifact; remote view must be a content-area mode, not a ViewerMode; 4 critical discoveries.

nodes.label: Deep research (Perplexity, pre-flow)
nodes.user_input: use perplexity if you like.. what is best way to do this
nodes.note: ScreenCaptureKit desktopIndependentWindow + VideoToolbox H.264 + WebCodecs-over-WebSocket (v1) / WebRTC (v2); CGEvent input injection; no off-the-shelf OSS does per-window macOS → browser with input.

nodes.label: Spec
nodes.command: /the-flow 1b specify "Remote view mode for chainglass: stream a single desktop app window (Godot game, iOS Simulator) from the host Mac into the content area with mouse/keyboard input; terminal over/beside it; agent-controllable via CLI/URL endpoints"
nodes.note: CS-5 (low end) -> Full Mode. 8/8 clarifications resolved in two rounds: Full/Hybrid testing/fakes-no-mocks/hybrid docs; domain remote-view approved as new business domain; latest-attach-wins sessions; auto-restore minimized; Chromium-gating. 14 ACs. 4 workshop opportunities flagged.

nodes.label: Workshops (4/4)
nodes.note: 001 mode mechanics: view param precedent found (recent-feed) — PanelShell needs NO changes, panel-layout modify softens to consume; rv param for session. 002 sessions: daemon-authoritative in-memory table, capture pauses unwatched, 300s grace, 9-row race matrix = TDD list. 003 protocol: JSON control (t-discriminated) + 16-byte-header binary video, AVCC, normalized coords, drop-never-queue backpressure; fake = third implementation. 004 daemon: SwiftPM in native/streamd, stable self-signed cert (TCC trap), open -g spawn, port-keyed registry, localhost control API proxied via Next routes.

nodes.label: Backpressure Check (post-spec seam)
nodes.note: Noop — repo has not adopted a harness; the seam routes to adoption, suppressed per --prompt-optional=false. Standard testing applies; no Recommended Phase 0.

nodes.label: Plan
nodes.note: READY — 7/7 gates PASS. 6 phases, ~36 core tasks, 8 target domains (1 new). Auto-ran /validate-v2: 4 agents (coherence, source-truth, thesis, forward-compat) → VALIDATED WITH FIXES; 11 fixes applied (version-mismatch handshake tasked into 5.1/6.2, CG_REMOTE_VIEW__DAEMON_PORT per ADR-0003, AC-2 latency measurement path into 3.4, deviation-ledger scope, Phase Index dependency honesty, auth test vectors, fixture-regeneration rule, Docker networking note). Validation Record appended to plan.

nodes.label: Phase 1: De-Risk Spike
nodes.note: COMPLETE — all 7 verdicts GO (commits 0b8fc8da, 7dbd35cf). T000/T007 harness noop. T001 capture Godot 45fps occluded/60s + Simulator deliver-on-change. T002 real fixture 254 frames avc1.640020. T003 mouse+keyboard inject (focus-sensitive). T004 Chromium decode 254/254 real. T005a stable-cert grant persists across rebuild (ad-hoc re-prompts=Finding 02 live); 5b bundle TCC by id+cert; 5c CGWindowID stable. Cross-cutting: SCStream needs NSApplication/CGS init (→4.3); reuse chainglass-dev cert+com.chainglass.streamd (→4.1). Workshops W004-Q1/W002-R6 resolved, W003-Q1/W002-grace deferred. Human-in-the-loop: grants attributed to Ghostty; stable bundle 'Chainglass Streamer' grant carries to Phase 4.
